description_long: This object appears to be a highly distorted and abstracted representation of an adult pedestrian, with exaggerated and stretched body parts. The figure's torso and upper body are unnaturally widened and flattened, with the head and one arm elongated and protruding at odd angles. The lower body, including the legs and feet, is more recognizable, showing a humanoid form with bent knees and boots. The clothing is stylized, with a jacket or coat featuring angular, sharp folds and a futuristic design. The overall appearance is surreal, with the figure's proportions and posture heavily warped, making it look almost as if it is being pulled or twisted by external forces. The surface details suggest a mix of fabric and synthetic materials, with some areas appearing smooth and others more textured.
description: A surreal, distorted adult pedestrian figure with exaggerated limbs and a futuristic, angular outfit. The lower body is more recognizable, while the upper body and head are stretched and abstracted.
description_view_0: The front view shows the most distorted features, with the head and arm stretched outward and the torso appearing wide and angular.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the bent legs and boots, with the upper body and arm extending horizontally and the jacket's angular folds visible.
description_view_2: The rear view emphasizes the back of the jacket and the elongated arm, with the figure's form appearing even more abstract and twisted.
description_view_3: This side view shows the bent legs and boots, with the upper body and head stretched away from the lower body, accentuating the surreal proportions.
attribute_clothing_type: futuristic jacket with angular design and fitted pants
